overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks along rain-soaked streets beneath elevated highways, crosses a busy intersection, and continues through dense urban canyons with neon signage and futuristic architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a modern building, approaching a street intersection

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters
dark facade with horizontal slats and illuminated signage
massive curved concrete overpass structure spanning the street
illuminated advertisement screen on building wall
tall modern lamp post with bright rectangular light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban sidewalk lined with palm trees and modern architecture. The player walks forward beneath a massive elevated highway structure, with digital billboards and street lights visible through the hazy rain.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and enters the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
vehicles pass by in both directions while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, moving through moderate traffic and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with a glowing purple umbrella crossing the street
person with a yellow umbrella waiting at the crosswalk

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide intersection crosswalk, navigating through moderate traffic. Other pedestrians with colorful umbrellas cross alongside, while vehicles pass in both directions on the wet roads beneath the elevated highway.

events.description: begins walking down the center of the street against traffic flow
weaves between oncoming vehicles including a truck and several cars

agents.ego_description: walking down the middle of the street against traffic, weaving between oncoming vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving toward the camera

entered.detail: wet asphalt road surface with double yellow lines
large white planters with palm trees dividing the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks down the center of the multi-lane street, navigating through moderate traffic. The elevated highway structure curves away to the left while futuristic buildings with glowing digital billboards line the right side of the street.

events.description: steps back onto the sidewalk from the street
passes close behind a woman holding a large red umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a woman with a red umbrella, passing various pedestrians including an NCPD officer

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire carrying a large red umbrella walking ahead
NCPD police officer in uniform walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: black metal security fence with pointed tops running along the sidewalk
wet concrete pavement with yellow curb

segments.scene_description: The player returns to the sidewalk, walking behind a woman with a distinctive red umbrella. The path runs alongside a black metal security fence with palm trees in planters, while the elevated highway remains visible in the distance. Various pedestrians including an NCPD officer walk along the rain-soaked pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from the shadow of a massive overpass into a bustling urban corridor. It begins on a sidewalk lined with palm trees and modern architecture, gliding forward beneath the heavy concrete of an elevated highway amidst hazy rain and digital billboards. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the perspective shifts to navigate a crosswalk filled with pedestrians carrying colorful umbrellas and vehicles passing on the wet asphalt. The scene then opens up as the camera moves down the center of a multi-lane street, following the curve of the highway as it peels away to the left to reveal towering buildings adorned with glowing signage. Finally, the movement returns to the sidewalk, trailing a woman with a red umbrella past a black security fence and an NCPD officer under the persistent drizzle.
